A1005A Ethnicity: No, not Hispanic, Latino/a, Spanish CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's ethnicity is other than Hispanic, Latino/a, or Spanish origin. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes) effective 10/01/2023
820 ETHNCTY_MEXICAN_CD ETHNCTY_MEXICAN_CD A1005B Ethnicity: Yes, Mex, Mex Amer, Chicano/a CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident's ethnicity is Mexican, Mexican American or Chicano/a. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not
